things.name: Ubud Sacred Monkey Forest
things.description: Ancient jungle sanctuary housing three Hindu temples and 700 long-tailed macaques

things.name: Tanah Lot Temple
things.description: Iconic sea temple perched on a dramatic offshore rock — one of Bali's most photographed sunsets

things.name: Tegalalang Rice Terraces
things.description: UNESCO-listed stunning stepped emerald rice paddies north of Ubud with traditional irrigation system

things.name: Uluwatu Temple & Kecak Fire Dance
things.description: Clifftop sea temple 70m above the Indian Ocean — evening Kecak fire dance at sunset is spectacular

things.name: Seminyak Beach & Sunset
things.description: Bali's most fashionable beach strip — surf, beach clubs, luxury villas and legendary sunsets

things.name: Mount Batur Sunrise Trek
things.description: Active volcano hike departing at 4am to reach the rim for a breathtaking sunrise above the clouds

things.name: Ubud Art Market & Palace
things.description: Traditional crafts, batik, silver and wood carvings in the market opposite the Royal Ubud Palace

things.name: Besakih Mother Temple
things.description: Bali's holiest and largest temple complex on the slopes of sacred Mount Agung

things.name: Nusa Penida Island
things.description: Fast boat to the stunning Kelingking T-Rex cliff, Angel's Billabong and pristine diving reefs

things.name: Traditional Balinese Cooking Class
things.description: Morning market visit then hands-on class learning to cook nasi goreng, satay and black rice pudding
